limitations: PLACEHOLDER — known gaps in canon coverage

runtime_class.classification_note: PLACEHOLDER — describe operational modes and transitions

primary_contradiction.thesis: PLACEHOLDER — the structural contradiction that defines this character
primary_contradiction.explanation: PLACEHOLDER — explain why this contradiction cannot be resolved, how it drives behavior, and what it makes impossible

structure.description: PLACEHOLDER — describe the wound, what was lost, and how it persists
impossibilities: PLACEHOLDER — something this wound makes impossible

origin_event.description: PLACEHOLDER — the event that created this wound

core_desire.statement: PLACEHOLDER — what the character wants most, in their own words if possible
core_desire.source: PLACEHOLDER — canon source or [I] if inferred
core_desire.interpretation: PLACEHOLDER — what this desire means structurally
core_desire.conflict_with_defense: PLACEHOLDER — how this desire conflicts with their defense system

primary_defense.name: PLACEHOLDER — name of primary defense
primary_defense.cost: PLACEHOLDER — the COST of using this defense

signature_move.name: PLACEHOLDER — signature action/gesture
signature_move.description: PLACEHOLDER — describe the signature move and what it means

defense_disabled_by.mechanism: PLACEHOLDER — how the defense is disabled

invocation_pattern.role: PLACEHOLDER — character's role in this invocation

cost_pattern.invocation: PLACEHOLDER — which invocation extracted this cost

residue_pattern.load_profile: PLACEHOLDER — describe residue distribution (e.g. 2 wounds, 1 ghost, 1 echo)

relationship_interfaces.behavioral_rule: PLACEHOLDER — how this character behaves toward the target

evolution_stages.name: PLACEHOLDER — stage name
evolution_stages.trigger: PLACEHOLDER — what triggers transition TO this stage
evolution_stages.operational_mode: PLACEHOLDER — how the character operates in this stage
evolution_stages.primary_residue: PLACEHOLDER — dominant residue in this stage

forbidden_behaviors.exception: PLACEHOLDER — valid exception or 'None. Absolute prohibition.'
forbidden_behaviors.penalty: PLACEHOLDER — what enforcing this costs narratively

fork_points.name: PLACEHOLDER — fork name
fork_points.canon_event: PLACEHOLDER — the canon event being diverged from
fork_points.new_questions: PLACEHOLDER — what questions does this fork open

sigil.name: PLACEHOLDER — sigil name or 'None'
sigil.function: PLACEHOLDER — what the sigil does, or 'No sigil function'

stress_test_prompts.scenario: PLACEHOLDER — scenario that should trigger a violation

transition_rules: PLACEHOLDER — when and how this variable changes
